name: getblocked
description: GetBlocked! is a free browser extension that reduces common third-party website trackers.

scripts.check: npm run generate:rules && npm run test:evidence && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:json && npm run check:generated && npm run check:safety
scripts.check:syntax: node --check background.js && node --check content-script.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check scripts/generate-rules.mjs && node --check scripts/evaluate-test-set.mjs && node --check scripts/check-json.mjs && node --check scripts/check-safety.mjs && node --check shared/config.js
